title: api.py: no validation of partition group node IDs
description:
File: python/src/lichen/sim/api.py
Lines: 460-474

add_chaos_partition does not validate that group items are strings:

    groups_raw = body.get('groups')
    ...
    groups = [set(group) for group in groups_raw]

A request with non-string node IDs like {"groups": [[1, 2], [3, 4]]} creates a PartitionRule with integer sets. Since node_id comparisons in _find_group use 'node_id in group' where node_id is always a string, the rule silently never matches anything.

Fix: Validate that all items in all groups are strings before creating the rule.

Impact: Minor - API accepts invalid input that silently fails; no security impact.
close_reason: Fixed validation, rule_id consistency, UTF-8 handling, and task exception handling with tests passing. 3 codereview passes via repeated pytest/ruff/mypy verification (correctness, edge cases, protocol compliance). No test changes or weakening.
